arts.ttl: Man United, Chelsea 'battling for £21m wonderkid' amid Tottenham, Aston Villa interest
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are reportedly in a race against Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United for Southampton youngster Tyler Dibling.

arts.ttl: ‘Changed his mind’: £60m Tottenham player has now decided he’d be happy to leave – journalist
arts.sum: Tottenham have a number of players they may want to sell in upcoming transfer windows. Indeed, after a slow start to this season, Ange Postecoglou...

arts.ttl: Tottenham in negotiations to sign 27-year-old in January – Confidence transfer is happening
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are in the picture to sign Getafe’s Omar Alderete in the winter market, according to reports. The La Liga side took the 27-year-old initially on loan from Hertha Berlin in 2022 and made his stay permanent the follow year. arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou Tottenham sack verdict given as key appointment prediction made
arts.sum: The pressure on Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou is mounting after a fragile performance against Chelsea - but there are some football.london readers in our comments section who back the Australian to fight his way out of the corner as the January transfer window looms. Jumboface says: "You cannot sack Ange just because of the way the players are playing.

arts.ttl: Tottenham's shocking injury list in full with 10 Postecoglou worries ahead of crucial fixtures
arts.sum: Following those two games this week, Spurs take on Manchester United in a Carabao Cup quarter-final and league leaders Liverpool in the space of just three days with Postecoglou certainly hopeful a number of his key players can feature. Inside just 15 minutes, Cristian Romero, making his first start in nearly four weeks, was forced off with a quad injury and now may not feature until the end of January.

arts.ttl: Gil rewarded, Donley boost and youngster's woes continue in Spurs loan latest
arts.sum: Manor Solomon returned to the Leeds United starting XI last Saturday for their 2-0 win over Derby County. Tottenham did sanction a number of loan deals at the start of 2024 and the same could possibly happen 12 months on, especially with some talented academy players in need of obtaining some first-team experience.

arts.ttl: The key reason why Tottenham are backing Ange Postecoglou and those Cristian Romero comments
arts.sum: Apart from that incredible 4-0 win over Manchester City in late November, Spurs have really struggled on the pitch in recent weeks and duly slipped down the Premier League table . arts.ttl: The ghostly parallels Rangers and Tottenham bosses share as Ange and Clement have under the radar kinship
arts.sum: Both bosses have bought themselves some time for markedly similar reasons

arts.ttl: Premier League manager set to replace Postecoglou at Tottenham
arts.sum: Tottenham are reportedly already looking at a potential replacement for struggling manager Ange Postecoglou, with a candidate from within the Premier League said to be impressing. According to a report from Football Transfers, Spurs would be ready to make a move to appoint Ipswich Town boss Kieran McKenna as their replacement for Postecoglou. arts.ttl: 'We'll feel that': Ange Postecoglou admits there's one thing about Rangers which will 'challenge' Tottenham
arts.sum: He knows this all too well! 😬
